purpose: Caption subtitle style reference for all editorial captions in digest and main sections.

caption_style.font_family: BIZ UDGothic Bold / Japanese heavy sans-serif
caption_style.shadow: none or extremely subtle; no visible black outline

observations.observed_text: より自律的に動ける人かが / すごく大事になってきている
observations.top_band: blue-purple gradient header with white slanted logo panel
observations.topic_title: white bold text in the top-right header

renderer_requirements: Use this caption style for all caption overlays, not only digest captions.
Use large heavy white text without black stroke.
Use tight stacked boxes for two-line captions.
Match the blue-purple gradient and box padding from this reference.
